header_subtitle: This site is a reflection of my journey as a software engineer, where I share my personal projects, insights, and the experiences that have shaped who I am today.
about_introduction: As a software engineer, I understand the importance of having a personal website to highlight my skills and projects. I had been putting off creating mine, always busy with work and other commitments. However, as time went on, I realized it was time to change that. So here I am, finally embracing the journey of building my online presence!
hero_headline: I build software, and I care how it feels to use.
hero_lead: I’m a software engineer based in Helsinki, finishing a master’s in human-computer interaction. Four years building products at scale, mostly on the front end with React and TypeScript, and lately I’m just as drawn to where AI fits into what I make.
footprints_description: A map of where I've lived, studied and wandered. 48 cities across 15 countries so far.
footer_blurb: Software engineer with an HCI background and a front-end core, based in Helsinki and open to new roles.
thank_you: Thank you for visiting this little corner I’ve carefully built. I hope it brings you a bit of inspiration, a smile, or a sense of connection. ❤️
connect_lead: I’m open to software roles and always happy to talk shop. The quickest way to reach me is email, but LinkedIn and GitHub work just as well.
skills_description: The tools, frameworks and disciplines I work with day to day, grouped by where they fit best.

home.title: Home - Miever
home.description: Welcome to my personal website, where I share my journey as a software engineer, my projects, and my insights.

resume.title: Resume - Miever
resume.description: Here you can view my resume, showcasing my educational background, work experience, and skills. My resume is a snapshot of my professional journey, highlighting my growth and achievements in software engineering.

blogs.title: Blogs - Miever
blogs.description: Here, I share my front-end experiences, technical insights, and personal growth stories.

designs.title: Designs - Miever
designs.description: Here, I showcase my design works, sharing my creativity and inspiration.

performance.title: Web Performance - Miever
performance.description: Here, you can view the performance metrics of my website, showcasing how I optimize user experience and loading speed in front-end development.

dashboard.title: Dashboard - Miever
dashboard.description: Here, you can view my dashboard, which provides insights into my website's performance, user behavior, and other key metrics.

projects.title: Projects - Miever
projects.description: Explore my projects that showcase my skills and creativity in software development.

miever_net.title: Miever.net
miever_net.subTitle: My personal website, built with Miever UI
miever_net.description: This is my personal website where I share my resume, blog posts, and projects. It is also a place where I experiment with ideas and apply what I learn in frontend engineering to a real, evolving product.

miever_ui.title: Miever UI
miever_ui.subTitle: A personal React component library
miever_ui.description: Miever UI is a personal React component library I built to support my own projects. It focuses on reusable components, customizable styles, and responsive design, helping me build interfaces faster and more consistently.

news_project.title: News Project
news_project.subTitle: A news application built with Angular and Electron
news_project.description: A news application that supports article listing, filtering, and management. It was originally built as a web app with Angular, and later extended with Electron to run as a desktop application.

ucloud_console.title: UCloud Cloud Console
ucloud_console.subTitle: Frontend work on a large-scale cloud console
ucloud_console.description: Three years of frontend engineering work on UCloud’s cloud console, focusing on networking products, monitoring components, and system-level consistency.
